parameters.query:
SELECT 
  sm.codigo,
  sm.numeronfs,
  sm.chave,
  sn.cc_ref,
  sn.obs_interno_pedido
FROM "NF_ServiceMetadata" sm
LEFT JOIN "NF_Service" sn ON sm.codigo = sn.id_servico
WHERE sm.numeronfs IN ({{ $json.transformed.map(item => "'" + item.RPS + "'").join(",") }});

INSERT INTO "ServiceNFReport" (
  "ID", "RPS", "Nota", "Cliente", "CNPJ", "Endereco", "Numero", "Complemento",
  "Bairro", "Cidade", "Estado", "CEP", "Email", "Telefone", "Vendedor",
  "ValorServicos", "ValorTotal", "TotalParcelas", "ValorDeducoes", "Aliquota",
  "ValorISS", "ISSRetido", "ValorCOFINS", "ValorPIS", "ValorCSLL", "ValorIR", 
  "ValorINSS", "ValorTributos", "DataPedido", "LocalPrestacao", "Contas",
  "Chave", "Protocolo", "Descricao", "DataEmissao", "Situacao", "DataCad",
  "DataMod", "cc_ref", "ObservacoesInternas", "created_at", "updated_at"
) VALUES {{ range($json.enriched) }}
(
  '{{ $item.ID }}',
  '{{ $item.RPS }}',
  '{{ $item.Nota }}',
  '{{ $item.Cliente }}',
  '{{ $item.CNPJ }}',
  '{{ $item.Endereco }}',
  '{{ $item.Numero }}',
  '{{ $item.Complemento }}',
  '{{ $item.Bairro }}',
  '{{ $item.Cidade }}',
  '{{ $item.Estado }}',
  '{{ $item.CEP }}',
  '{{ $item.Email }}',
  '{{ $item.Telefone }}',
  '{{ $item.Vendedor }}',
  '{{ $item.ValorServicos }}',
  '{{ $item.ValorTotal }}',
  '{{ $item.TotalParcelas }}',
  '{{ $item.ValorDeducoes }}',
  '{{ $item.Aliquota }}',
  '{{ $item.ValorISS }}',
  '{{ $item.ISSRetido }}',
  '{{ $item.ValorCOFINS }}',
  '{{ $item.ValorPIS }}',
  '{{ $item.ValorCSLL }}',
  '{{ $item.ValorIR }}',
  '{{ $item.ValorINSS }}',
  '{{ $item.ValorTributos }}',
  '{{ $item.DataPedido }}',
  '{{ $item.LocalPrestacao }}',
  '{{ $item.Contas }}',
  '{{ $item.Chave }}',
  '{{ $item.Protocolo }}',
  '{{ $item.Descricao }}',
  '{{ $item.DataEmissao }}',
  '{{ $item.Situacao }}',
  '{{ $item.DataCad }}',
  '{{ $item.DataMod }}',
  '{{ $item.cc_ref }}',
  '{{ $item.ObservacoesInternas }}',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
){{ if $index < ($json.enriched.length - 1) }},{{ /if }}
{{ /range }}
ON CONFLICT ("RPS")
DO UPDATE SET
  "Nota" = EXCLUDED."Nota",
  "Cliente" = EXCLUDED."Cliente",
  "CNPJ" = EXCLUDED."CNPJ",
  "ValorServicos" = EXCLUDED."ValorServicos",
  "ValorTotal" = EXCLUDED."ValorTotal",
  "Situacao" = EXCLUDED."Situacao",
  "cc_ref" = EXCLUDED."cc_ref",
  "updated_at" = NOW()
WHERE (
  "ServiceNFReport"."Cliente" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."Cliente" OR
  "ServiceNFReport"."CNPJ" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."CNPJ" OR
  "ServiceNFReport"."ValorServicos" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."ValorServicos" OR
  "ServiceNFReport"."ValorTotal" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."ValorTotal" OR
  "ServiceNFReport"."Situacao" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."Situacao" OR
  "ServiceNFReport"."cc_ref" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."cc_ref"
);
